findings.description: The knowledge file omits the feature that TableIdGenerator assigns IDs in the order that business processes commit: "業務処理の確定順に採番を行うことができる". This is a notable characteristic of TableIdGenerator that distinguishes its behavior from other ID generators.
findings.source_evidence: Source クラス定義 section for TableIdGenerator: "また、業務処理の確定順に採番を行うことができる。"

findings.description: Automated pre-check reported 7 knowledge sections vs 12 source headings. However, the knowledge file's section structure is appropriate: sub-sections of 特徴 (h3) are merged into s2, sub-sections of 要求 (h3) are merged into s3, and 構造 sub-sections (クラス図, 各クラスの責務) are merged into s4. The large テーブルを使用した採番機能 section is appropriately split into s5/s6/s7. No content is lost by this structure. This warning does not represent a real issue.
